Now Available on the App Store

The calendar
that understands you.

Type "dinner with Sarah next Friday at 7" and ChronoSync creates the event instantly. Natural language. No forms. No friction.

Download on the App Store

Free to download · Premium unlocked once, forever

Everything your calendar should be.

Works with iCloud, Google, Exchange, and Office 365. Your data stays exactly where it has always been.

Natural Language

Say or type what you mean. ChronoSync parses your intent and previews the event in real time before you save.

Travel Time Alerts

MapKit calculates how long you need to get there and sends a leave-by nudge before it's too late.

Built for Apple

iPhone, Apple Watch, Apple Vision Pro, and Lock Screen widgets — ChronoSync moves with your whole ecosystem.

Photo-to-Event OCR

Scan a flyer or screenshot and ChronoSync reads the date, time, and location automatically.

Calendar Sets

Group calendars into Work, Personal, Health sets and toggle focus modes with a single tap.

One-Time Premium

No subscription. No monthly fee. Pay once and unlock the full cross-device experience for good.

See it in action.

A closer look at the screens you'll use every day.

Natural language input

Premium & connected accounts

Connect iCloud, Google & Exchange

Your calendar, everywhere.

A glance from your wrist. A voice command. A spatial window on Vision Pro. ChronoSync is built for the way you actually live.

  • iPhone — Day, Week, Month & List views
  • Apple Watch — Complications & wrist dictation
  • Apple Vision Pro — Spatial calendar window
  • Widgets — Lock Screen & Home Screen

Take back your day.

Download ChronoSync and experience a calendar that works as fast as you think.
